subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: The Sun of Reality, by which we mean the Perfections of God, appears, like the physical sun, to change its position in the spiritual heavens relatively to us.
subcodes.subjects: @suffering; rejection of Christ, @Manifestation of God as sun, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @outward and inward meanings, @symbolism, @literal interpretation
